name: Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
2. Line a pie plate with one pastry. Cut to fit and poke holes with a fork.
3. In a small bowl, mix sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and flour.
4. Toss apples with lemon juice. Add the flour mixture to apples and toss to coat.
5. Put in pie plate and dot top with butter.
6. Cover with second pastry, seal and crimp edges, and cut slits in center.
7. Bake about 50-60 minutes, until crust is lightly browned. (You may want to cover the outside edge with foil to prevent burning. A baking sheet or double thickness of foil on the rack beneath the pie will save cleanup time.)
8. For French Apple Pie, use a single crust and top pie with 1/2 cup butter, 1/2 cup packed brown sugar, and 1 cup flour mixed together until crumbly. Reduce oven temperature to 400 degrees and bake 45-55 minutes.
